title: Polish Bean Stew with Flaky Crust
description: A hearty Polish-inspired stew made with beans and served with a crispy flaky crust. Perfect for a comforting meal.
instructions: Peel and chop the carrots and onions.
Heat oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onions and cook until softened.
Add the chopped carrots and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the dried beans, bay leaves, salt, and black pepper.
Pour in enough water to cover the beans and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Roll out the flaky pastry to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
Place the pastry over the beans and crimp the edges.
Cut a few slits in the top of the pastry to allow steam to escape.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the pastry is golden brown.
